intro.title: Welcome to HASHINMY
intro.copy:
We build custom software for companies that operate, sell and grow in local and international markets. We integrate AI, automation, PC programs, CAD software with DXF export, web applications, cloud, SEO, chatbots, technical quoting tools, security and operational continuity.
Medellín and Colombia are our origin; our commercial and technical reach is global.
We drive companies’ technological development with 100% financed solutions, helping them reach their full potential, improve productivity and scale more efficiently.
intro.insight: The initial diagnosis helps turn a real need into a clear, finance-ready technical route prepared to grow.

options.label: No financing
options.hint: I want to receive a quote with no financing
options.insight: I want to receive a direct quote without a financing plan.

options.label: 100% financing
options.hint: I want to move forward with clear USD installments
options.insight: I want to move forward with 100% financing as the main modality.

serviceFamily.title: What do you want to achieve first?
serviceFamily.optionQuestion: What do you want to solve first?
serviceFamily.copy: Choose the starting point and we will prepare a clear route to turn your need into a real proposal. Hashinmy turns this choice into a clear route with scope, controls and next steps, so the business can sell, operate or scale with less friction.
serviceFamily.insight: I choose the path that best fits my current priority.

options.label: Build software
options.hint: A platform, app or system (digital product)
options.insight: I want to build a custom digital product.

options.label: Automate or use AI
options.hint: Less manual work (RPA, API or AI)
options.insight: I want the system to work for my team, not the other way around.

options.label: Modernize operations
options.insight: I want to turn scattered processes into a connected operation.

buildType.title: Where should your software open?
buildType.optionQuestion: Where do you want to use it?
buildType.copy: This decision defines the foundation: browser, phone or PC. Hashinmy can combine modules later if the project needs it.

options.label: In a browser
options.insight: I want browser access with server, database and a route ready to scale.

options.label: On mobile
options.hint: For sales, support or field teams (app/PWA)
options.insight: I need a fast phone experience with synchronized data.

options.label: On a PC
options.insight: I need local control, strong performance and stable internal operation.

automationType.title: Which part should the system do for you?
automationType.optionQuestion: What do you want to automate first?
automationType.copy: Automation is not adding AI because it is trendy: it removes friction, errors and repeated tasks where it really hurts.

options.label: Repeated tasks
options.insight: I want process robots, integrations and automatic flows.

options.label: AI assistant
options.insight: I want useful AI with clear rules, traceability and safe limits.

options.label: Visible data
options.insight: I need to see my operation in numbers to decide better.

modernization.title: What do you want to leave behind?
modernization.optionQuestion: What do you want to replace first?
modernization.copy: Modernization turns isolated tools into a safer, measurable system prepared to grow. Hashinmy turns this choice into a clear route with scope, controls and next steps, so the business can sell, operate or scale with less friction.

options.label: Excel or old system
options.insight: I want to replace spreadsheets and manual processes with modules and permissions.

options.label: Separated tools
options.insight: I want my systems to connect and avoid duplicate typing.

options.label: Unprofessional image
options.insight: I want a platform that communicates trust, clarity and readiness to sell more.

operation.title: How should it be used in real life?
operation.optionQuestion: Where do you need it to work best?
operation.copy: Your answer tells us whether backend, synchronization, mobile app or local software makes more sense.

options.label: From anywhere
options.insight: I want browser, server and data available when I need them.

options.label: Team on the move
options.insight: I need mobile speed, clear permissions and reliable synchronization.

options.label: PC or internal network
options.insight: I need it to work strongly on desktop and synchronize later if needed.

value.title: What should improve first?
value.optionQuestion: What result do you want to notice first?
value.copy: A good platform is not only attractive: it organizes, automates and shows useful data for decisions.

options.label: Organize processes
options.insight: First I want to organize how each case moves inside my business.

options.label: Automate work
options.insight: I want to recover time by reducing repetitive tasks and human errors.

options.label: Measure with data or AI
options.insight: I want to turn scattered information into visible decisions.

risk.title: What should feel most protected?
risk.optionQuestion: What do you want to protect better?
risk.copy: Security is not added at the end: it is designed with permissions, auditing and clear rules based on the operation.

options.label: Users and permissions
options.hint: Each role sees only what it needs (RBAC)
options.insight: I want roles, permissions, change history and access control from the start.

options.label: Sensitive data
options.insight: I need validations, event logs and protection for critical information.

options.label: AI or critical processes
options.insight: I want AI and automation with limits, traceability and human review when needed.

finance.title: How do you want to move forward without stopping operations?
finance.optionQuestion: How do you want to organize payment?
finance.copy: Development can be organized in USD installments according to scope and approval. Hashinmy turns this choice into a clear route with scope, controls and next steps, so the business can sell, operate or scale with less friction.

options.label: Finance 100%
options.hint: Avoid pulling all capital at once (USD installments)
options.insight: I want a financeable, clear and monthly proposal.

options.label: Quote by phases
options.insight: I want to launch by modules, validate first and grow with control.

options.label: Talk to someone
options.insight: I want Hashinmy to contact me with a clear route and enough context.

timeline.title: How soon should it start breathing?
timeline.copy: This separates a useful first version from a large platform built by stages. Hashinmy turns this choice into a clear route with scope, controls and next steps, so the business can sell, operate or scale with less friction.

options.label: As soon as possible
options.insight: I want to find the minimum core that already creates value.

options.label: 1 to 3 months
options.insight: I want to define scope, build, test and launch with control.

options.label: Enterprise stages
options.insight: I want security, scaling, auditing and planned evolution.

summary.title: We now understand what you need.
summary.copy: Your route is ready. Before sending it, you can add any detail that matters; the Hashinmy team will review the project direction, financing option and next steps with clear commercial and technical context.
summary.insight: My route is ready to be sent with contact and optional comment.
